properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: They tell me Jesus died For my transgressions And He paid the price a long, long time ago When He died for me On a hilll called Calvary And there's something else I want to know

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Does He still feel the nails Every time I fail? And He hear the crowd Cry crucify again? Am I causing Him pain And I know I've got to change I just can't bear The thought of hurting Him

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It seems that I'm so good At breaking promises And I treat His precious grace So carelessly But each time He forgives What if He relives The agony He felt on that tree

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Holy, holy, holy is the Lord Holy, holy, holy is the Lord

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Do You still feel the nails every time I fail Have I crucified You Jesus with my sin And I'm tired of playing games And I really want to change I just can't bear the thought of hurting Him

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Holy, holy, holy is the Lord Holy, holy, holy is the Lord
